holdings.infoBox: RNRG is an equity ETF with a total of 41 individual holdings. The top holdings are Enlight Renewable Energy stock at 7.58%, Ørsted at 6.44%, EDP Renewables at 5.97%, AXIA Energia at 5.81%, and Meridian Energy at 5.77%.

overview.description: The Global X Renewable Energy Producers ETF (RNRG) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Indxx Renewable Energy Producers index, a market-cap-weighted index of global renewable energy companies including YieldCos. RNRG was launched on May 28, 2015 and is issued by Global X.
